ops.title: SPM re-pin to cc-transcript: ghost-pin resolved; Package.swift comment now stale
ops.body: Verified 2026-07-23: the cc-transcript pin in CCVigilShared/Package.swift is revision dadcda0b98d7abaaf30d38677cb762ffa0ec72eb, which IS reachable from cc-transcript origin/main (git merge-base --is-ancestor passes) — the earlier ghost-pin problem (e04b44cd, rewritten out of history and GC-able) is resolved by the pin bump that rode the daemonkit/v0.4.0 work. No re-pin needed. Remaining nit for whoever next touches CCVigilShared/Package.swift: the comment 'cc-transcript ships no semver tags for the Swift package' is stale — cc-transcript now tags v14.x releases (v14.9.0 current); consider pinning to tagged releases or updating the comment. Left deliberately unedited here because the active session's @ holds Package.resolved + Packages/daemonkit.
